THE PROTOCOL

OUR MISSION

FOR THE URBAN PROFESSIONAL

The Reality: You commute through diesel fumes, walk past construction sites, and face harsh UV exposure. Your skin accumulates layers of urban pollution that accelerate inflammaging and compromise your skin barrier.

The Mission: METROGLOW is designed specifically for young professionals (20-35) living in dense cities. We eliminate the guesswork by providing a synergistic, clinical-premium protocol to mechanically target pollution damage mechanisms.

THE DAMAGE MECHANISM

1
Pollutants Contact Skin
→
2
ROS (Oxidative) Formation
→
3
Lipid Peroxidation in Membranes
→
4
Inflammation & Collagen Degradation
→
5
Visible Aging, Dullness & Pigmentation

Rush Hour Refresh Gel Cleanser: Washes away particulate matter and urban debris.
Daily Reset Serum & Triple Acid Exfoliator: Neutralises oxidative stress and accelerates cellular turnover.
Urban Barrier Daily Moisturiser: Repairs the lipid membrane and soothes inflammation.
UV Defence Fluid: Shields against photopollution and prevents collagen degradation.
